lore.english:
Taimanin. Daughter of Sagou Bungo, a.k.a. Library. But after splitting up with her father, she uses her mother's last name, "Izumo". She lost all her limbs after getting involved in a series of murders that shook Gosha, but was saved by Fuuma Kotaro. After that incident, she set her sights on becoming his maid full-time and stormed Fuuma Manor to declare this; however, it seems she is now officially recognized as Fuuma Kotaro's maid. Her motto—also her late mother's dying words—is, “Repay your enemies twofold, and your benefactors a hundred.

Having lost both her arms and legs, she is equipped with cybernetic limbs. She uses Mechanical Art, which allows her to create intricate machines from metallic materials. She can freely transform her prosthetic limbs, such as turning her arms into rifles or attaching blades to her legs.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&HP] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase HP of All allies by 20% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase HP of All allies by 20% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Bullet Party[-]
skills.description:
Goes on a shooting spree and attacks the enemy 7 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:820102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:820102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:820102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Goes on a shooting spree and attacks the enemy 7 times.
Target hit is inflicted with (10%) Bleed at a 5% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

Focuses energy into the gun and fires a powerful shot at the enemy.

skills.description_readable:
Focuses energy into the gun and fires a powerful shot at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with Weaken(19.5%) at a 45% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Performs a Shield Penetrate attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]The Grateful Tsuru[-]
skills.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if the character's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]70%[-], restores [&HP] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:820302]%[-] of Max. [&HP].
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] or more, gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:820301]%)[-] [&AtkUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:820301] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
On Turn Start, if the character's HP is less than 70%, restores HP by 20% of Max. HP.
On Turn Start, if the character's HP is 70% or more, gains (45%) ATK UP.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
